# UNCHAINED Project Board

UNCHAINED is a local-first creative AI platform.
This project board tracks implementation of UNCHAINED Music, plus platform work that enables future modules: Image, Voice, Video, and Data.

## What this project covers

- Product and architecture execution for the platform and current module
- Backend APIs and services
- Frontend views and interactions
- Desktop shell integration
- Metadata quality and provenance
- Testing, stabilization, and release readiness

## Current scope

### Active module

- UNCHAINED Music (alpha): import, metadata enrichment, provenance, DJ Studio tooling

### Platform direction

- Shared media library and job engine
- Plugin-ready capabilities
- Local-first model orchestration
- Expansion to image, voice, video, and data workflows

## Work organization

- backend
- ui
- desktop
- data
- docs
- qa

## Working agreements

- Keep each issue focused and implementation-ready
- Include acceptance criteria before moving to active work
- Mark impacted layers clearly
- Include a verification plan in every implementation issue

## Status

- Stage: Alpha
- Primary platform: Windows desktop-first
- Notes: Breaking changes can happen while core architecture and module boundaries are still being finalized
